Name: -1_dont_poor_music_art
Representative_Docs: ["Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste. My mother has poor taste. We don't like the same things, therefore my opinion of her likes and tastes are poor.", 'When I say that someone has bad taste, I generally mean that I view negatively the art/music/literature that that person enjoys.  That is, I don\'t think it conveys any meaning, I don\'t think that the person who created it has any talent, and I don\'t see the value in it.  I have to admit that it often means that this is very subjective, in that it often means that I myself don\'t like the art/music/literature at all myself. I have a family member who has very poor taste, in my opinion.  I listen to the music he plays for me, but I don\'t "get" them; the songs seem poorly executed and don\'t have anything to say.  He loves to decorate his apartment with pieces that look garish and outlandish to me, but he thinks that they are beautiful and coordinate well with each other.  The art on his walls doesn\'t appeal to me either.', "Bad taste can be different to everyone, for me it would be something I dislike. An example: if I dislike a piece of art and someone else likes it, I would say this person has bad taste in art.  We don't share the same kinds of music, if anything I think he has a horrible taste in music. I feel like music needs to have meaning or have a message. Most of the music he listens to doesn't have any, which makes it hard to identify with. To me he has a poor taste in music, to him maybe not."]

Name: 0_dont_poor_say_friend
Representative_Docs: ['"Bad taste" would mean the opposite of "good taste." Say that I prefer a certain style of movie, possibly something like arthouse or experimental, and another person only likes faster-paced, mainstream theatrical releases. We would probably refer to each other\'s preferences as "bad taste," even though neither style necessarily has any more or less merit. In a rational sense, I don\'t believe in "bad taste" since everyone has personal preferences of what they can enjoy. However, oftentimes I still do judge others\' taste in movies. One of my friends, in particular, can only watch action movies. They don\'t care about any of the other aspects of a movie, they only care about the action. If it doesn\'t have action they get bored. I consider their taste to be poor. It\'s a bad habit of mine.', "Bad taste would be defined by a lack of manners or behavior not quite up to a certain innate standard that seems to be inborn with me. Being crude, crass or vulgar, for example, would be in low taste to me. I was born and raised in the southern United States , where historically there are behaviors that divide bad and good taste, regardless of any racial group or financial status. Some things just aren't done, or they would be considered tacky. It's weird because I don't remember ever being specifically told what was good and what was not, it was just understood, if that makes any sense.  It's hard to explain this and not feel like a snob. Well, I would have to say yes I know someone who I consider to have bad taste. There is a difference though between someone who doesn't know any better versus someone that knows how to act but ignores that fact. Again, to me taste and style are two different animals. Style can change and evolves, I think but taste is more of a character quality.  And I am a huge snob probably lol, although I would never tell anyone or show in any way that I thought someone acted in bad taste or had bad style either way. That would be in bad taste, in my opinion.", 'The person enjoys something that I think is bad. Like they enjoy a certain movies and they recommend those movies to me. The movies are usually horrible. I would say that person has bad taste.  Similar scenario. I know someone that enjoy suggesting shows to me, but half the time the shows are bad. I often say this person has bad taste in shows.']

Name: 1_sense_likes_doesnt_dismissive
Representative_Docs: ['A person who does not respect others and uses horrible language around others to make their selves look big! Someone who has a bad moral character  I know a person who thinks he is the best HeLies and would cheat anyone out of a nickel He treats women like they were trash and hates animals', "Narrow minded and narrowly focused.  Dismissive of anything outside of their likes and interests and not open to expanding their focus. He's dismissive of of musical genres such as jazz, classical, hip hop - no interest in anything that might require some effort.", 'Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn\'t realize that others may take offense. A person who can\'t distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority. I had an employee several years ago that considered herself an artist, she was always whining about how difficult it was to create something that others didn\'t seem to appreciate - she was always looking for her "audience". The problem was that her esoteric leanings may have made a great deal of sense to her but the rest of the world saw them as poorly envisioned crap.']

Name: 2_trump_donald_garish_behavior
Representative_Docs: ["In my opinion, the term 'bad taste' isn't as relative. It means that a particular work of art is considered to be of poor quality by an overwhelming number of observers.      By contrast, I think that former President Trump has very bad taste. I suspect this based on how consistently lies and how he doesn't seem to respect anyone - including himself.  I imagine that such a man would choose things are many would consider to be vulgar and disgusting.", 'Bad taste, would be people who like what I don\'t.  Such as the Trump\'s garish gold apartment.  Of course this is tasteless. and bad taste is still taste.  This person is Trump.  He likes to eat Burger World.  He likes garish. He wears an ugly tie...the same one, like everyday. What a fucking idiot.  He prefers "entertainment news\' to the real news.  0 taste.', 'Questionable behavior, handles situations in a poor manner, either by action or words. Gives people a bad vibe in their manner. President Donald Trump personified bad Taste. His behavior, his words and actions at times cause one to cringe. A lack of compassion leads him to terrible statements. A disregard to anyone who did not agree with him and his reaction is normally a crass remark.']
